overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring a lush forest environment. The character walks along rocky and grassy paths surrounded by tall pine trees, ferns, and large boulders, with a dinosaur-like creature visible in the background and steam rising in the distance.

events.description: camera passes through hanging leaves briefly obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the rocky forest path surrounded by ferns

notable_agents.action: large dinosaur-like creature standing still among the trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming dense forest canopy
dark gray rock outcropping along the path
uneven ground covered with stones and dirt
green ferns and low vegetation lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky forest path surrounded by dense ferns and tall pine trees. A large dinosaur-like creature is visible standing among the trees to the left. The camera briefly passes through some hanging leaves, partially obscuring the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy clearing with massive tree trunk

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past a massive tree trunk on the right side

entered.detail: very large tree trunk with rough bark texture
small purple flowers scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from rocky terrain to grassy clearing as the character walks past a massive tree trunk on the right. Purple wildflowers dot the grass on the left side of the path while the forest continues ahead.

events.description: camera brushes past large leaves in the foreground temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: character walking through denser vegetation with large leaves brushing the camera

notable_agents.action: dinosaur tail swaying as creature moves through trees

entered.detail: decaying tree trunks on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser section of forest with thick undergrowth and moss-covered rocks. The dinosaur's tail is visible swaying among the trees to the left. Large leaves brush past the camera, briefly obscuring the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy meadow with steam vents

events.description: steam or smoke becomes visible rising from the ground in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking through open grass toward distant steam rising from the forest

entered.detail: white steam or smoke rising from the forest floor
field of smaller rocks and stones scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wide grassy meadow with scattered rocks. Steam or smoke rises from the ground ahead, becoming visible as the character approaches. The terrain becomes more rocky again as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, prehistoric forest that gradually opens into a steaming meadow. It begins with the character navigating a rocky path flanked by ferns and pine trees, passing a large dinosaur-like creature standing among the foliage as hanging leaves briefly brush the lens. As the terrain transitions from rock to a grassy clearing, the camera moves past a massive tree trunk and purple wildflowers before entering a thicker section of forest filled with mossy rocks and the swaying tail of the creature. The scene then shifts as the dense undergrowth gives way to a wide grassy meadow with scattered boulders. Finally, the camera advances toward plumes of steam rising from the ground as the terrain becomes increasingly rocky once more.
